Projects

Personal Website

A minimalist Astro site for profile, resume, projects, and notes.

  • Astro
  • TypeScript
  • Markdown
  • CSS

This project keeps personal content close to the source: Markdown for writing and JSON for structured profile data.

The goal is a calm, fast, and extensible site that can evolve as the underlying resume and project portfolio become more complete.

lmever.
